claims: The skill requires sending the entire git diff (containing potentially sensitive code changes and proprietary information) to OpenAI's external API servers. While generating descriptive stash names is the stated purpose, this represents significant privacy risk as all code changes are transmitted to a third-party service without clear data handling disclosures, local processing alternatives, or user consent mechanisms beyond providing an API key.
